rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Termination Of Further Proceedings And Discharge Of Administrator
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, although the administrator never amended his ex parte petition to correct the date of death on the order appointing him, and paragraph 18 of his petition claims that more than four years have elapsed since the issuance of Letters, and notice could not have been given of the hearing of this petition, as alleged in paragraph 19 of the petition, as the hearing date was not yet known at the time the petition was filed.
